data.title: Hut 8's 2024 Surge: $162M Revenue, $331M Net Income
data.description:
Hut 8 Corp., a leading energy infrastructure platform, has reported impressive financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company, which integrates power, digital infrastructure, and compute at scale to fuel next-generation, energy-intensive use cases such as Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing, has demonstrated strong operational excellence and bottom-line economics.

The company's full-year 2024 revenue reached $162.4 million, with net income of $331.4 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $555.7 million. These impressive figures reflect Hut 8's commitment to disciplined growth and strategic allocation of capital. The company's 12.3-gigawatt development pipeline, along with its fortified balance sheet and optimized operations, positions it well for continued success in 2025.

Hut 8's power segment generated $56.6 million in full-year revenue, securing a 205 MW behind-the-meter site in Texas and advancing three large-scale AI data center development projects. The digital infrastructure segment contributed $17.5 million in full-year revenue, completing the greenfield development and energization of a 63 MW Bitcoin mining facility and securing a major colocation contract with BITMAIN Technologies Ltd.

The compute segment generated $80.7 million in full-year revenue, partnering with BITMAIN to develop and launch a next-generation ASIC miner and launching Highrise AI, a wholly-owned subsidiary providing GPU-as-a-Service. The company also executed a purchase agreement for BITMAIN Antminer S21+ miners, which is expected to increase self-mining hashrate and drive average fleet efficiency.

Hut 8's strategic hires, including Asher Genoot as CEO, Sean Glennan as CFO, and Victor Semah as CLO, have strengthened the company's bottom-line economics and fortified its balance sheet. The company's capital strategy and balance sheet have been bolstered by a $150 million strategic investment from Coatue, the conversion of a $37.9 million Anchorage Digital loan balance to shares of common stock, and the launch of a $500 million ATM program and a $250 million stock repurchase program.

The company's strategic Bitcoin reserve of 10,171 Bitcoin, with a market value of $949.5 million

data.title: Co-op Admits Unlawful Land Deals Blocking Rival Supermarkets
data.description:
The Co-operative Group Limited (Co-op), a major UK supermarket chain, has admitted to 107 breaches of the Groceries Market Investigation (Controlled Land) Order 2010. The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) found that co-op had entered into unlawful anti-competitive land agreements, preventing rivals from opening competing stores nearby. This admission has significant implications for the competitive landscape in the UK's grocery retail market and potential consequences for consumers.



The unlawful land deals, also known as restrictive covenants and exclusivity arrangements, restrict competition among supermarkets by preventing rivals from opening competing stores nearby. These deals include restrictive covenants that prohibit land from being used for a supermarket and exclusivity arrangements that prevent landlords from allowing competing stores in the same block as an existing supermarket. Co-op admitted to 107 breaches of these orders, including agreements that prevented land from being used for a supermarket.

The CMA's enforcement of the Groceries Market Investigation (Controlled Land) Order 2010 has significantly influenced the behavior of other large grocery retailers, such as Tesco, Sainsbury's, and Asda. The Order was introduced to prevent supermarkets from imposing restrictions that block rivals from opening competing stores nearby, thereby ensuring that shoppers have more choice and access to cheaper prices. The CMA's enforcement actions have led to these retailers addressing their breaches and complying with the Order's rules.

Tesco admitted to 23 breaches of the Order in 2020 and agreed to remove the restrictions identified by the CMA from its land agreements to become compliant. Sainsbury's admitted to 18 breaches of the Order between 2011 and 2019 and agreed to remove the outstanding restrictions from its land agreements to comply with the Order. Asda admitted to 14 breaches of the Order between 2011 and 2019 and agreed to remove the restrictions identified within its land agreements to become compliant.

The CMA's enforcement actions have sent a clear message to other large grocery retailers that breaching the Order will not be tolerated. The CMA's targeted program of activity has ensured that these retailers are aware of the consequences of non-compliance and have taken steps to address their breaches. This enforcement has likely encouraged other retailers to review their land agreements and ensure they are in compliance with the Order, thereby promoting fair competition and benefiting consumers.

Moreover, the CMA's wider work in the groceries sector, including investigations into loyalty pricing and market studies into the infant formula and follow-on formula market, demonstrates its commitment to protecting competition and ensuring that shoppers have access to a wider range of groceries and cheaper prices. This ongoing scrutiny is likely to further influence the behavior of large grocery retailers, encouraging them to comply with competition rules and regulations.

In conclusion, Co-op's admission of 107 breaches of the Groceries Market Investigation (Controlled Land) Order 2010 has significant implications for the competitive landscape in the UK's grocery retail market and potential consequences for consumers. The CMA's enforcement of the Order has influenced the behavior of other large grocery retailers, promoting fair competition and benefiting shoppers. The CMA's ongoing work in the groceries sector is likely to continue influencing the behavior of these retailers, promoting competition and benefiting consumers.

data.title: Will Weakness in American Financial Group, Inc.'s (NYSE:AFG) Stock Prove Temporary Given Strong Fundamentals?
data.description:
American Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: AFG) has experienced a recent dip in its stock price, raising questions about the sustainability of its strong fundamentals. However, a closer examination of the company's financial performance and prospects suggests that this weakness may be temporary.



AFG's earnings and revenue growth trends have contributed positively to its stock performance over the past five years. In 2024, the company's revenue was $8.01 billion, an increase of 7.49% compared to the previous year's $7.45 billion. Earnings were $887.00 million, an increase of 4.11%. This growth can be attributed to the company's strong underwriting performance and focus on specialty lines, leading to consistent profitability.

Looking at the company's quarterly earnings, we can see that afg has maintained a steady growth in core net operating earnings. In the first quarter of 2024, core net operating earnings were $231 million, compared to $247 million in the first quarter of 2023. This decrease reflects lower returns in AFG's alternative investment portfolio when compared to the strong performance of this portfolio in the prior year period. However, the company's annualized return on equity for the first quarter of 2024 was 21.2%, which is a significant improvement from the 18.9% in the first quarter of 2023.

In the third quarter of 2023, AFG's core net operating earnings were $208 million, compared to $192 million in the third quarter of 2022. This increase was due primarily to higher year-over-year net investment income, which was partially offset by lower underwriting profit in the Specialty Property and Casualty (P&C) insurance operations. The company's annualized return on equity was 18.3% for the third quarter of 2023, compared to 17.1% in the same period of 2022.



AFG's strong underwriting performance and focus on specialty lines have contributed to its consistent profitability. The company's ability to generate high returns on equity and maintain a strong balance sheet position it well for continued outperformance in the insurance industry. As AFG continues to focus on its core competencies and expand its specialty lines offerings, it is well-positioned to maintain its competitive advantage and deliver strong financial results for shareholders.

In conclusion, american financial group, Inc.'s recent stock price weakness may prove temporary, given the company's strong fundamentals and prospects for continued outperformance. The company's focus on specialty lines, strong underwriting performance, and consistent profitability position it well for future growth. Investors should closely monitor AFG's financial performance and consider the company as a potential investment opportunity.

data.title: Trump Set to Reverse Mexico, Canada Tariffs Amidst Market Turmoil
data.description:
President Donald Trump is expected to reverse tariffs on Mexico and Canada as early as today, according to hints from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick. The move comes amidst conflicting messages from the administration, leaving consumers and Wall Street grappling with uncertainty.

The tariffs, imposed less than 24 hours ago, have already sparked retaliation from Mexico and Canada. The 25% levies on Canadian and Mexican imports, along with the additional 20% tariff on Chinese goods, have sent markets into a tailspin, with investors struggling to gauge the long-term feasibility of the trade war.

Trump's aggressive trade policies have been a central theme of his presidency, with the latest actions marking a significant escalation. Six weeks into his second term, the U.S. president has taken aim at America's three biggest trading partners, raising concerns about the potential economic fallout.

The trade war has left many wondering what comes next. As Trump assumes responsibility for the consequences of his actions, markets and consumers alike brace for further volatility. The uncertainty surrounding the tariffs has disrupted manufacturers and markets, with consumers already feeling the pinch.

The situation has left many feeling a sense of "whiplash," as the administration's actions on trade and other issues have shifted dramatically from those of the previous administration. Local experts have noted the stark contrast between the Biden and Trump administrations' approaches to Ukraine and Russia, highlighting the challenges of navigating the ever-changing political landscape.

As Trump prepares to deliver an address to a joint session of Congress, he faces fallout from the enactment of the new tariffs. The stock market has already seen sharp declines, and consumers are grappling with the potential impact on their wallets. With uncertainty lingering, all eyes are on the White House as the administration weighs its next move in the ongoing trade saga.

data.title: Huobi Opens RED Deposits, Launches RED/USDT Trading Pair
data.description:
Huobi HTX, a leading global cryptocurrency exchange, has announced that it will open deposit services for RED (RedStone) at 6:00 PM today. Additionally, the exchange will jointly launch the RED/USDT trading pair on March 6th. This move is expected to further expand the trading options available to users on the platform.

RedStone, the fastest-growing oracle, focuses on providing yield-bearing collateral for the lending market, securing assets worth over $10 billion. It offers various in-demand asset data, including LSTs, LRTs, and Bitcoin LSTs, bringing a richer and more secure option to the decentralized finance ecosystem. Previously, HTX Ventures, the investment arm of Huobi HTX, made a strategic investment in RedStone Oracles to support the development of modular DeFi infrastructure.

Huobi HTX's decision to open deposit services and launch the RED/USDT trading pair comes as the cryptocurrency market continues to grow and evolve. As more users seek access to a wider range of trading options, exchanges like Huobi HTX are responding by expanding their offerings. This move is likely to be well-received by users looking to diversify their portfolios and take advantage of new trading opportunities.

The launch of the RED/USDT trading pair is also expected to increase liquidity on the platform, making it easier for users to buy and sell RED tokens. This, in turn, is likely to attract more users to the platform, further boosting its growth and popularity.

In addition to the RED/USDT trading pair, Huobi HTX has also announced that RED withdrawals will be open on March 7th at 21:00 (GMT+8). This will allow users to easily transfer their RED tokens off the platform if they wish to do so.

Overall, Huobi HTX's decision to open deposit services and launch the RED/USDT trading pair is a positive development for the cryptocurrency market. By expanding its offerings and increasing liquidity, the exchange is helping to drive growth and innovation in the decentralized finance ecosystem.

data.title: Riskified's Triumphant 2024: Revenue Surge and Adjusted EBITDA Milestone
data.description:
Riskified Ltd. (NYSE: RSKD), a leader in ecommerce fraud and risk intelligence, has just announced its financial results for the three and twelve months ended December 31, 2024. The company has exceeded its high-end revenue guidance for the fiscal year and achieved its first full year of positive Adjusted EBITDA. Let's dive into the key highlights and explore what this means for Riskified's future.



Riskified's revenue growth has been primarily driven by its go-to-market strategy, contributing to 10% year-over-year revenue growth in both the third quarter and the first nine months of 2024. The company's expansion into new verticals and geographies has also played a significant role in its financial success. For instance, in the first nine months of 2024, riskified achieved GMV growth of 16% and non-GAAP gross profit growth of 17% year-over-year, outpacing its revenue growth. This demonstrates the company's ongoing commitment to adjusted EBITDA margin expansion.

One of the most notable achievements for Riskified in 2024 was the 800 basis point expansion in its Adjusted EBITDA margin. This expansion is a testament to the company's disciplined management of its business, driving ongoing revenue and gross profit margin growth, as well as decreases in operating expenses across each area of the expense base. Riskified's ability to manage its bottom line has positioned it well for further Adjusted EBITDA margin expansion in 2025 and beyond.



Riskified's product diversification strategy has been a key driver of its financial performance. In 2024, revenue from additional products increased by approximately 90% year-over-year, representing approximately 10% of total new bookings won during the year. This growth demonstrates the company's success in expanding its product offerings and reducing its dependency on a single revenue stream. One key example of this diversification is the launch of Adaptive Checkout, an AI-powered fraud prevention and ecommerce conversion solution that combines fraud detection with conversion optimization. This product, along with other new offerings, has contributed to Riskified's overall revenue growth and improved financial performance.

In conclusion, Riskified's triumphant 2024, marked by revenue growth and the achievement of positive Adjusted EBITDA, is a testament to the company's strategic focus on expanding its product offerings, entering new verticals and geographies, and managing its business in a disciplined manner. As Riskified looks ahead to 2025, investors can expect the company to continue building on its momentum, driving further growth and margin improvement.

data.title: NATO's Drone Dilemma: Unprepared for the Future of Warfare
data.description:
As the conflict between Russia and Ukraine continues to escalate, the use of drones has emerged as a critical factor in modern warfare. However, a senior Ukrainian military commander has warned that NATO armies are ill-prepared to face the drone threat, raising concerns about the alliance's ability to adapt to the evolving nature of combat. This article explores the challenges NATO faces in the realm of drone warfare and the investments required to counter these emerging threats.



The war in Ukraine has demonstrated the devastating potential of drone warfare. Both Russia and Ukraine have employed drones extensively, with loitering munitions and swarming capabilities proving particularly effective. These advancements have led to significant casualties and damage to military equipment, highlighting the urgent need for NATO to invest in counter-drone technologies and adapt its strategies accordingly.

NATO's Drone Dilemma

NATO's current capabilities and doctrines are not well-equipped to handle the drone threat. Traditional military strategies and doctrines focus on large, expensive platforms, while drones offer a more cost-effective, versatile, and decentralized alternative. This mismatch in capabilities and tactics has left NATO forces vulnerable to drone attacks, as demonstrated in the conflict between Russia and Ukraine.

To address this challenge, NATO must invest in several key areas:

1. Counter-Drone Technologies: NATO countries must prioritize the development and deployment of advanced counter-drone systems, such as electronic warfare (EW) systems, anti-drone netting, and high-powered lasers. These technologies can disrupt, jam, or physically destroy enemy drones, providing a crucial defense against drone attacks.
2. Drone Defense Training: NATO forces must incorporate drone defense training into their curricula, teaching soldiers how to identify, track, and counter drone threats. This includes understanding the tactics used by enemy drone operators and developing effective countermeasures.
3. Armed Drones and Swarming Capabilities: NATO should invest in armed drones and explore the use of drone wingmen and swarming tactics. These capabilities can provide a cost-effective and flexible alternative to manned aircraft, enabling NATO forces to engage in drone warfare on equal terms with potential adversaries.
4. Policy and Doctrine: NATO must establish clear legal and ethical norms for drone warfare, addressing issues such as autonomous weapons, collateral damage, and the use of commercial drones in military operations. Additionally, NATO should review and update export control standards to prevent the proliferation of drones to hostile actors while still allowing for legitimate defense and research purposes.

The Future of Warfare

The increasing use of drones in warfare, as demonstrated in Ukraine, underscores the urgent need for NATO to adapt its training, tactics, and equipment to better prepare for drone warfare. By investing in counter-drone technologies, drone defense training, armed drones, and policy and doctrine, NATO can enhance its operational effectiveness and maintain its competitive edge in the face of evolving threats.

As the conflict in Ukraine continues to evolve, NATO must learn from the lessons of this war and adapt its strategies accordingly. The future of warfare is being shaped by the use of drones, and NATO must be prepared to face this challenge head-on to ensure the security and stability of the alliance and its member states.

data.title: The State of the Union- What to Expect
data.description:
President Donald Trump is set to deliver his first joint address to Congress of his second term on Tuesday night, an event that is expected to be more spectacle than substance. While the address will receive significant media attention, it is unlikely to introduce any groundbreaking policy initiatives. Instead, it will serve as a platform for Trump to reaffirm his key policy positions, many of which have been at the center of his administration’s early actions.

What to Expect in the Address

The overarching theme of Trump’s speech will be “the renewal of the American Dream,” according to White House officials. He is expected to highlight his administration’s early efforts to reshape the federal government, particularly in areas such as immigration, tariffs, and diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) policies. These are topics that have been central to his presidency so far, and Tuesday’s address will be an opportunity for him to reinforce his commitment to these policies rather than introduce new legislative proposals.

A major focus of the speech will be immigration. Trump is expected to call for additional funding for border security and deportation efforts, aligning with his administration’s aggressive approach to enforcement. This comes on the heels of a series of executive actions aimed at tightening border controls and expediting deportations. The president may use this moment to criticize congressional Democrats for obstructing his immigration agenda and call on lawmakers to approve further restrictions.

Trade policy will also feature prominently in Trump’s remarks. His administration recently imposed 25% tariffs on goods from Mexico and Canada, along with an additional 10% tariff on Chinese imports. These tariffs have rattled markets, and while Trump is unlikely to walk them back, any indication of flexibility or potential exemptions could be a key takeaway for investors. Markets have reacted negatively to the trade war rhetoric, and a reversal or softening of these policies could provide a much-needed boost for equities.

The Ukraine Factor

Another area of focus will be Trump’s stance on Ukraine. His administration’s relationship with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has been tense, highlighted by last week’s contentious Oval Office meeting. The potential for a U.S.-Ukraine mineral deal, which had been viewed as a pathway toward easing tensions, remains uncertain. If Trump announces any progress on this front, it would be a significant development. Conversely, if he continues to criticize Zelenskyy and maintain a hardline approach, it could exacerbate concerns about his administration’s shifting alliances.

The Role of Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency

Elon Musk’s role in Trump’s administration has been another point of intrigue. As the de facto head of the newly created Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), Musk has spearheaded efforts to slash federal spending and eliminate bureaucratic redundancies. While these efforts have been praised by fiscal conservatives, they have also drawn criticism for their rapid implementation and potential legal challenges. Trump is expected to defend these actions in his speech, arguing that they are necessary to rein in government waste. Musk’s presence at the event will further underscore his influence in the administration.

Market Implications and Political Theater

From a market perspective, the speech is unlikely to introduce new catalysts unless Trump signals a shift on key economic policies such as tariffs. Investors will be listening for any indication of relief measures or negotiations that could ease the impact of the trade war. Additionally, any unexpected announcements related to fiscal policy, particularly regarding government spending, could impact market sentiment.

Beyond policy, the atmosphere in the chamber will be closely watched. The address is likely to be highly partisan, with Republicans cheering Trump’s remarks while Democrats express vocal opposition. Disruptions from Democratic lawmakers are possible, continuing a trend of increasingly confrontational State of the Union addresses in recent years. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries has urged Democrats to maintain a strong presence, and some members have invited guests who have been directly impacted by Trump’s policies to highlight their opposition.

The Democratic Response

Following Trump’s address, Senator Elissa Slotkin of Michigan will deliver the official Democratic response. Slotkin, a former CIA analyst who won a competitive Senate race in 2024, is expected to focus on national security and economic concerns. Her remarks will likely highlight the administration’s handling of Ukraine, the impact of tariffs on American businesses, and efforts to counteract the administration’s moves on dei programs.

Additionally, key Democratic leaders, including Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, have encouraged members to bring guests who have been affected by Trump’s policies, such as Medicaid recipients and former federal employees who lost their jobs due to budget cuts. This will serve as a visual contrast to Trump’s guest list, which includes individuals affected by crimes allegedly committed by undocumented immigrants and Marc Fogel, a former Russian detainee recently released.

Conclusion

Tuesday’s joint address will likely be more about messaging than policy. Trump is expected to emphasize his administration’s early achievements while setting the stage for future battles with Congress. The speech will offer little in terms of new legislative initiatives but will reinforce his commitment to his existing agenda. Markets will be watching closely for any surprises, particularly around tariffs and international relations, but expectations remain low for any major shifts in policy. Meanwhile, the political theatrics surrounding the speech will be just as notable as the content itself, as Democrats prepare to push back forcefully against Trump’s vision for his second term.

data.title: CrowdStrike's Q4 2025: Contradictions in Customer Retention, AI Strategy, and Falcon Flex Adoption
data.description:
These are the key contradictions discussed in CrowdStrike's latest 2025 Q4 earnings call, specifically including: Customer Churn and Retention, Net New ARR Seasonality, AI War and Data Security, Falcon Flex Adoption and Impact, and Geopolitical AI Armed Race and AI War Strategy:



Financial Performance and Revenue Growth:
- CrowdStrike reported Q4 net new ARR of $224 million, surpassing expectations and closing FY 2025 at $4.24 billion in ending ARR.
- The growth was driven by strong customer engagement, excellent execution, and accelerating market opportunities.

AI Integration and Innovation:
- The company's AI-native single platform and innovation engine were highlighted, with Charlotte AI deals increasing, aiming to drive AI outcomes for customers.
- The integration of AI is crucial for CrowdStrike as it helps customers leverage AI for SOC operations and threat response times.

Cloud Security and Identity Protection Growth:
- Cloud Security business grew more than 45% with ending ARR over $600 million, and Identity Protection ended with more than $370 million in ARR.
- Growth in these areas was driven by trends like the increasing identity attack surface and the need for integrated identity protection solutions.

Next-Gen SIEM Expansion:
- CrowdStrike's Next-Gen SIEM business grew more than 115% year-over-year, reaching more than $330 million in ending ARR.
- The expansion was fueled by the unique advantages of the platform, including unmatched speed, scalability, and cost efficiency compared to legacy SIEMs.

Ecosystem and Partnership Success:
- CrowdStrike's ecosystem partners sourced 60% of new business in FY 2025, with the GSI business approaching $1 billion and growing over 40% year-over-year.
- The growth was attributed to the company's partner-first strategy, strategic investments in cloud marketplaces, and the attractiveness of the Falcon Flex subscription model.

data.title: Crypto's Mirage: Insiders Cash Out, Retail Investors Left Behind
data.description:
The crypto landscape has shifted, with a growing sense of disillusionment among investors. The LIBRA scandal and the recent Bybit hack have exposed a coordinated playbook where hype, exclusivity, and controlled liquidity create a mirage of opportunity, only for insiders to cash out at the peak, leaving retail investors with losses. This has led to a wake-up call, with some calling for a change in the systems being built.

The real threat, however, is not just regulation, but the return of centralized gatekeepers. Telegram, once considered an essential Web3 platform, has pivoted to align with U.S. regulators and Big Tech players, enforcing monopolistic restrictions on blockchain development. This is a familiar playbook, reminiscent of Apple's App Store 2.0, but for crypto. Controlling access, dictating which chains get visibility, and reshaping the ecosystem on their terms is a worrying trend.

Web2 was supposed to be open, but a handful of corporations consolidated power, built walled gardens, and turned the internet into a rent-seeking empire. Web3 was supposed to replace traditional finance with something better, but without a clear commitment to decentralization, the industry is slipping back into the hands of centralized players. Regulation won't save Web3; it was never supposed to. The real question is whether Web3 can still prove it has a purpose beyond gambling.

The solutions are structural. We know that platforms with centralized gatekeepers will always prioritize profit over principles. Instead of funding and building real alternatives, we've been handing the spotlight and liquidity to the same schemes that make Web3 look like a Ponzi playground. Censorship resistance, interoperability, and decentralized control are Web3's only real competitive advantages. The moment we start mimicking Web2's monopolistic models, we lose everything that made crypto worth fighting for.

The path forward is clear: open systems, cross-chain accessibility, and ruthless resistance to centralized control. If Web3 continues to prioritize speculation over infrastructure, hype over substance, and quick flips over long-term innovation, we will have no one to blame for its downfall but ourselves.

data.title: TrendForce: TSMC to invest US$165 billion in the US, with production expected to start as early as 2030.
data.description: According to TrendForce's latest research, tsmc (TSM.US) recently announced to increase its investment in advanced semiconductor manufacturing in the US, with a total amount of US$165 billion. If the expansion of the three new plants goes smoothly, it is expected that the production will start gradually after 2030 and reach 6% of TSMC's production in the US by 2035, but the production capacity in TSMC's Taiwan plants will still account for or exceed 80%. TrendForce said that in order to cope with potential international risks, TSMC planned to set up six plants in Arizona when it announced to build its first advanced manufacturing plant there in 2020.Since 2018, factors such as global trade disputes and the COVID-19 pandemic have accelerated the differentiation of the supply chain, and governments are eager to establish local production capacity. According to TrendForce's statistics, from the location of the plants, the global wafer-level CSP capacity in 2021 is still dominated by Taiwan, accounting for 71% of advanced process and 53% of mature process.TrendForce expects that after a series of overseas expansion actions, the advanced process capacity in Taiwan will decrease to 58% in 2030, while the mature process capacity will be 30%. Meanwhile, US and Chinese mainland manufacturers are actively expanding in the advanced and mature process markets, respectively.TrendForce said that since US customers account for the largest proportion of TSMC's advanced process adoption, it is inevitable to expand investment in the US. Besides announcing the construction of three new advanced manufacturing plants, TSMC also expanded to two advanced packaging plants and a research and development center for HPC, making Arizona a key advanced technology park for TSMC in overseas.TSMC's increased investment in the US has raised concerns about technology outflow, but TrendForce observed that the planned capacity of the first to third phases of the Arizona plant is far lower than that of the Taiwan plant, whose importance is self-evident. Although expanding production in the US can reduce the risk of over-concentration of manufacturing, the potential cost pressure may be passed on to US IC customers, leading to higher prices for components or even terminal products and affecting consumer purchasing intentions.TrendForce observed that TSMC's Arizona phase 1 has just entered production, and phases 2 and 3 are still under construction, and it is expected to start production between 2026 and 2028. The actual implementation time of the newly announced plants is still under observation, and it has not had a significant impact on the industry in the short term. Whether the cost pressure will lead to cost transfer in the long term is worth watching.

data.title: The Family Comes Together: PUMA and Scuderia Ferrari HP Celebrate 20 Years of Speed
data.description:
PUMA and Scuderia ferrari hp have been a power couple in the world of sports and motorsports for two decades now. As we celebrate their 20th anniversary, let's take a look at how this iconic partnership has evolved, influenced the broader sportswear and motorsports industries, and maintained a balance between preserving the Ferrari brand identity and incorporating modern design elements and performance technologies.



PUMA and Ferrari first joined forces in 2005, with PUMA becoming the licensing partner for Ferrari-branded products and the supplier of F1 team and race wear for Ferrari. This marked the beginning of a successful collaboration between the two brands, which has since grown and expanded. In 2023, Ferrari and PUMA renewed their multi-year partnership, with PUMA becoming the Premium Partner starting from the next year. This renewal demonstrates the enduring trust and synergy between the two brands and their commitment to offering increasingly engaging experiences for their fans.

The PUMA x Ferrari collaboration has significantly influenced the broader sportswear and motorsports industries in several ways. The partnership has successfully blended the iconic Ferrari racing heritage with modern, forward-looking designs, inspiring other sportswear brands to incorporate motorsports elements into their collections. This fusion has catered to the growing interest in racing culture among consumers. Additionally, the collaboration has emphasized the importance of performance and style, setting a new standard in the sportswear industry and encouraging other brands to prioritize both aspects in their designs.

PUMA has leveraged the popularity of Ferrari drivers like Charles Leclerc to promote its collections, attracting a broader range of consumers, including motorsports fans and fashion enthusiasts. The partnership has also adapted to changing consumer preferences, with the 2025 Replica Collection featuring exaggerated, fashion-forward silhouettes and oversized designs, reflecting the current trend towards bold, statement pieces in sportswear.



The PUMA for Scuderia Ferrari HP collection has maintained a balance between preserving the iconic Ferrari brand identity and incorporating modern design elements and performance technologies. The collection features the iconic Ferrari red color and the yellow Scudetto emblem, ensuring that it remains true to the Ferrari brand identity. At the same time, the collection incorporates modern design elements, such as exaggerated, fashion-forward silhouettes and oversized versions of classic teamwear items, appealing to fashion-forward individuals while still maintaining the Ferrari brand identity.

The collection also incorporates performance technologies, such as the PUMA T7 tracksuit, which is designed to bring Formula 1® energy beyond the racetrack. This ensures that the collection is not only stylish but also functional and performs well in various conditions. The collection includes driver-specific items, such as the Scuderia Ferrari HP Hamilton Baseball Cap and the Scuderia Ferrari HP Leclerc Baseball Cap, showcasing the passion of fans who want to showcase their support for their favorite drivers while still maintaining the Ferrari brand identity.

In conclusion, the PUMA and Scuderia Ferrari HP partnership has been a force to be reckoned with in the world of sports and motorsports for the past 20 years. This iconic collaboration has influenced the broader sportswear and motorsports industries, adapted to changing consumer preferences, and maintained a balance between preserving the Ferrari brand identity and incorporating modern design elements and performance technologies. As we celebrate their 20th anniversary, it's clear that this partnership is here to stay, continuing to push the boundaries of style and performance in the world of sports and motorsports.

data.title: 3 AI Stocks That Could Help Make You a Fortune
data.description:
In the rapidly evolving world of artificial intelligence (AI), investing in the right stocks can lead to significant returns. As AI continues to transform various industries, the demand for AI-driven solutions is expected to grow, presenting exciting opportunities for investors. Here are three AI stocks that could help make you a fortune:



1. C3.ai Inc (AI)
C3.ai Inc is a leading AI software provider for enterprise-scale applications. The company offers a range of AI-powered solutions, including predictive analytics, natural language processing, and computer vision, among others. C3.ai Inc differentiates itself by providing an end-to-end AI platform that enables businesses to build, deploy, and manage AI applications at scale. This platform is designed to be flexible, scalable, and easy to use, allowing businesses to quickly develop and deploy AI solutions tailored to their specific needs.

C3.ai Inc's platform is built on a foundation of advanced machine learning algorithms and is designed to be highly customizable, allowing businesses to adapt it to their unique requirements. This focus on customization and scalability sets it apart from competitors that may offer more generic AI solutions.

2. johnson & Johnson (JNJ)
Johnson & Johnson is a multinational corporation that operates in the healthcare sector. While not primarily an AI company, it has been investing in AI technologies to enhance its products and services. The company has been using AI to improve drug discovery, medical imaging, and patient care. For instance, J&J's Janssen Pharmaceutical Companies have been using AI to identify new drug candidates and optimize clinical trials.

J&J differentiates itself by leveraging AI to enhance its core healthcare offerings, rather than focusing on AI as a standalone product. This allows the company to integrate AI into its existing business model, creating new opportunities for growth and innovation.



3. berkshire hathaway Inc (BRK.A)
Berkshire Hathaway is a multinational conglomerate holding company that engages in various businesses, including insurance, utilities, and manufacturing. Like J&J, Berkshire Hathaway is not primarily an AI company but has been exploring AI technologies to improve its operations. The company has been using AI to enhance its underwriting processes, fraud detection, and customer service. For example, Berkshire Hathaway's GEICO insurance subsidiary has been using AI to improve its claims processing and customer service.

Berkshire Hathaway differentiates itself by leveraging AI to optimize its existing businesses, rather than focusing on AI as a standalone product. This allows the company to integrate AI into its diverse portfolio of businesses, creating new opportunities for growth and efficiency.



In conclusion, investing in AI stocks like C3.ai Inc, Johnson & Johnson, and Berkshire Hathaway Inc can provide significant long-term growth prospects. These companies have demonstrated their ability to leverage AI technologies to enhance their products and services, creating new opportunities for growth and innovation. As the AI market continues to grow, these stocks could help make you a fortune. However, it is essential to conduct thorough research and consider your risk tolerance before making any investment decisions.

data.title: Box's Q4 2025: Navigating Contradictions in Seasonality, AI Pricing, and Budget Dynamics
data.description:
These are the key contradictions discussed in Box's latest 2025Q4 earnings call, specifically including: Seasonality of Business, AI Unit Consumption and Pricing Strategy, and AI Budget Allocation:



Revenue and Financial Performance Growth:
- Box reported revenue of $280 million for Q4, up 6% year-over-year and 8% in constant currency.
- The growth was driven by stabilization of IT budgets, continued demand for Box AI, and the launch of Enterprise Advanced.

Operating Income and Margin Expansion:
- Box achieved an operating margin of 27.3% in Q4, exceeding expectations despite currency headwinds.
- This was attributed to cost discipline, advancing workforce location strategies, and successful revenue growth.

Enterprise Advanced and AI Integration:
- The company introduced Enterprise Advanced, leading to closed deals and significant customer interest in AI-driven document management and automation.
- The adoption of AI and intelligent content management platforms is driving transformation in enterprise workflows.

Billings and Customer Retention:
- Box's billings for Q4 were $399 million, up 5% year-over-year and 7% in constant currency.
- This was driven by solid bookings, early renewals, and a strong net retention rate of 102%, reflecting customer commitment and satisfaction.

Investment in Strategic Initiatives:
- The company continues to expand its presence in Poland, increasing full-time employees to 470.
- This investment is part of strategic workforce location strategies and cost discipline measures.

Crypto Elite Converge in Moscow: Blockchain Forum 2023
data.description:
The crypto landscape is abuzz with activity, as top brands and industry leaders gear up for the 14th Blockchain Forum in Moscow on April 23-24. With over 15,000 attendees expected from around the globe, the event promises to be a significant gathering for the crypto community.

The forum will feature exclusive presentations from international leaders in the industry, including Justin sun, Founder of TRON; Sergei Khitrov, Founder of Listing Help and Jets Capital; Xinxi Wang, Co-founder of Litecoin Foundation; Gracy Chen, CEO of Bitget; Sandy Peng, Co-founder of Scroll; Stephan Lutz, CEO of Bitmex; Chris MM Crypto, Crypto Influencer; Crypto Jack, Crypto Influencer; and Cris D. Tran, Head of Growth at Sandbox, among many others.

The event will cover a wide range of topics, including the latest developments in blockchain technology, cryptocurrency regulation, and the potential applications of blockchain in various industries. As the crypto scene continues to evolve, events like these play a crucial role in driving innovation and shaping the future of the industry.

In addition to the Blockchain Forum, other crypto-related events and developments are taking place around the world. For instance, the QUASA group recently announced that its Quasacoin (QUA) token has been listed on the Uniswap decentralized exchange, further expanding its reach and accessibility.

As the crypto scene heats up, it is essential to stay informed about the latest trends and developments in the industry. Events like the Blockchain Forum provide an excellent opportunity for professionals and enthusiasts alike to learn, connect, and contribute to the growth of the crypto ecosystem.

data.title: "Animoca Brands Surges 12% in Revenue, Driven by Blockchain Gaming and Digital Assets"
data.description:
Animoca Brands, a leading blockchain game and investment company, has reported a significant increase in revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024. The company's unaudited financial results show that revenue reached $314 million, representing a 12% year-over-year growth from the previous year's $280 million.

The company's strong performance was driven by its digital asset advisory business, which contributed $165 million in bookings, up 116% from the previous year. Additionally, the company's Web3 operating businesses and subsidiaries generated $110 million in bookings, while investment activity contributed $39 million.

Animoca Brands' portfolio of blockchain games and Web3 projects also played a significant role in the company's success. Notable contributors to the results included The sandbox, Moca Network, Open Campus, Anichess, gamee, TinyTap, Animoca Brands Japan, nWay, Eden Games, Blowfish Studios, Pixowl, and Crazy Defense Heroes (TOWER).

The company's operating expenses decreased by 12% in 2024, compared to the previous year, as a result of optimization initiatives across the company and its subsidiaries. Total operating expenses for the 12 months ending on December 31, 2024, were $217 million, compared to $246 million in the prior 12 months.

As of December 31, 2024, Animoca Brands' financial assets and token reserve balances included cash and stablecoin balances of $293 million, digital assets of $538 million, and minority investments in over 540 portfolio companies valued at $564 million. The company also holds off-balance sheet token reserves of $2.9 billion, comprising tokens issued by Animoca Brands' majority-owned Web3 subsidiaries and projects.

Throughout the year, Animoca Brands made strategic investments in over 70 projects across various sectors, including AI, infrastructure, decentralized finance (DeFi), and gaming. Notable investments included 0G Labs, Cookie3, FLock.io, MyShell, and Talus. The company's focus on AI projects resulted in investments in liquid tokens of AI-themed projects such as Virtuals, ai16z, Aixbt

data.title: UK's Royal Navy Monitors Russian Warship: Implications for Defense Stocks
data.description:
The UK's Royal Navy has been closely monitoring a Russian warship, the Boikiy, and a merchant vessel, the Baltic Leader, as they sailed through the English channel and North Sea. This development highlights the growing geopolitical tensions between the UK and Russia, which could have significant implications for defense stocks in the UK and Europe.



The Royal Navy's frigate, HMS Somerset, tracked the Russian warship and merchant vessel, which were believed to be carrying weapons destined for the Ukraine conflict. The monitoring of these vessels is part of the UK's ongoing efforts to counter potential threats to national security, including critical infrastructure such as undersea cables or pipelines.

The passage of the Russian warship through the English Channel has raised concerns about the potential for further escalation or miscalculations between the UK and Russia. This could lead to increased vigilance and preparedness by the UK's military and intelligence services, potentially straining resources and requiring additional funding. The UK has already been increasing its defense spending in response to growing threats, including those from Russia. The passage of the Russian warship may further bolster the case for increased defense spending, particularly in areas such as naval and maritime security.

The heightened geopolitical tensions between the UK and Russia could have several implications for the performance of defense stocks in the UK and Europe. Increased demand for defense products and services, driven by higher defense spending, could lead to higher demand for defense stocks, driving up their prices. Additionally, a flight-to-quality phenomenon could occur, where investors shift their investments from smaller or less established defense companies to larger, more stable ones. This could lead to increased investment in established defense companies from countries like the UK and the US, which have robust defense industries and strong ties with NATO.

However, the potential risks and uncertainties associated with geopolitical tensions could also impact the performance of defense stocks. Any disruptions to supply chains or trade routes due to geopolitical tensions could impact the performance of defense stocks. Additionally, the potential for further escalation or miscalculations between the UK and Russia could lead to market volatility or decreased investor confidence.

In conclusion, the UK's Royal Navy monitoring of the Russian warship and merchant vessel highlights the growing geopolitical tensions between the UK and Russia, which could have significant implications for defense stocks in the UK and Europe. Increased defense spending, a flight-to-quality phenomenon, and potential risks and uncertainties are all factors that investors should consider when evaluating the performance of defense stocks in the region.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash Surges 24% Amidst Market Rally and Upgrade Hopes
data.description:
Bitcoin Cash (BCH) has experienced a significant surge in the past 24 hours, breaking the $380 mark and increasing by over 24%. This notable price rise comes amidst a broader rally in the cryptocurrency market, with many altcoins also witnessing substantial gains.

The surge in BCH's price can be attributed to several factors. Firstly, the recent halving event, which reduced the block reward by half, has historically led to price increases in the past. Secondly, the growing interest in decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms, which often rely on the Bitcoin Cash network for transactions, has driven demand for BCH. Lastly, the upcoming Bitcoin Cash upgrade, which aims to improve the network's scalability and functionality, has also contributed to the bullish sentiment.

However, it is essential to note that the cryptocurrency market is highly volatile, and prices can fluctuate significantly in a short period. While the current rally is encouraging, investors should remain cautious and monitor the market closely. As always, it is crucial to do thorough research and consider your risk tolerance before making any investment decisions.

data.title: Metaplanet Boosts Bitcoin Holdings to 2,888 BTC Amidst Market Volatility
data.description:
Metaplanet Inc., a Japan-based firm, has bolstered its Bitcoin holdings to 2,888 BTC, investing $43.9 million in 497 BTC amidst market volatility and surging stock prices. This strategic acquisition aligns with the company's ambitious goal to amass 10,000 BTC by 2025 and 21,000 BTC by 2026, reflecting a bullish stance on the cryptocurrency market.

CEO Simon Gerovich stated, "We are committed to expanding our Bitcoin holdings as a long-term asset," indicating that Metaplanet's approach mirrors that of other prominent investors. The recent acquisition has equipped Metaplanet with a total of 2,888 BTC, valued at approximately $240 million at current market prices. This bold move signifies the firm's confidence in Bitcoin's potential as a resilient store of value, especially during market downturns.

Bitcoin recently experienced notable volatility, dipping under $83,000 amid geopolitical tensions following tariffs imposed by the U.S. President on Canada, Mexico, and China. However, a subsequent recovery saw Bitcoin rebound to just under $90,000. This fluctuation highlights the fragile nature of cryptocurrency markets, predominantly influenced by external economic factors. Tracy jin, COO of crypto exchange MEXC, expressed optimism, stating that substantial rate cuts by the Federal Reserve could present a considerable market opportunity this year.

With this latest acquisition, Metaplanet has solidified its position among the top 15 largest corporate Bitcoin holders, now controlling over 0.01% of the total Bitcoin supply. This strategic positioning parallels the legendary investment approach of figures such as Michael Saylor. The firm seeks not only to enhance its portfolio but also aims to outperform quarterly yield targets, having increased its projected yield to 45.1%, significantly surpassing the initial goal of 35%. Such performance metrics underscore the company's commitment to leveraging Bitcoin as a core asset for long-term growth.

In addition to expanding its Bitcoin reserves, Metaplanet has planned a remarkable $745 million fundraising initiative via zero-discount moving strike warrants, marking one of the largest fundraising efforts in Asia. This innovative approach highlights Metaplanet's proactive stance towards capitalizing on market opportunities
